servers.description: Connect to Blender for 3D scene creation, manipulation, and export with visual feedback loops

tools.approvalPrompt: This will execute Python code in Blender. Review the code before approving.

servers.notes: Keep network-backed integrations disabled per project policy. Work on explicit copies; never overwrite user-selected source scenes.
